ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code used to identify the course */,
  "credit_hour" TEXT /* Credit hours associated with the course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisite_text" TEXT /* Human-readable description of prerequisites */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can enroll */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the course is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the instructor was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the instructor's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study for the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Current year of study */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the student's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student in the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the department was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the department's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "prerequisite_course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course schedule entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course scheduled */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the course is offered */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the course */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the course */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the course is held */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the course is held */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course during this schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_schedules_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., syllabus, assignment) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the material */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the material was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
